title: WorkRelationshipType
description: The relationship of the worker with the Employer or Contractee Organization.

id.description: Provides a unique identifier to a specific work relationship.

typeCode.description: The type of work relationship between the Employer or Contractee Organization and the worker. Options are Employment, Contract, Volunteering.

organizationId.description: Provides a unique identifier to the Employer or Contractee Organization.

status.description: Status of the relationship between the Employer or Contractee Organization and the Worker.

workAgreements.description: The work agreements for a work relationship.

workAssignments.description: The assignments for the worker. An assignment may override the position and/or job information.
